text:
{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <DESCRIPTION>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden.</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appelé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>
    <DESCRIPTION>avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique</DESCRIPTION>
    <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <NOTE>davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht</NOTE>
    <PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa santé</TITLE>
    <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>
    <DESCRIPTION>Augmenté d'un Nouveau Supplement de deux Volumes, par</DESCRIPTION>
    <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR>
    <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT>
    <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <NOTE>davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht</NOTE>
    <PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <NOTE>So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben:</NOTE>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE>
    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofredi</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":15,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Fixed Unicode escape sequences to proper characters (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to ä). 3. Structured the text into proper XML elements with nested tags for better hierarchy. 4. Corrected misspelled tags (e.g., <PRICE> to <PRIZE>). 5. Added missing tags for text segments that were not enclosed (e.g., <DESCRIPTION>, <NOTE>). 6. Fixed inconsistent tag usage (e.g., <AUTHOR> tags were not properly nested). 7. Escaped special characters like '&' to '&'. 8. Corrected 'Gotofrest' to 'Gotofredi' in the title. 9. Fixed '4\u221a\u2264' to '4to.' for consistency. 10. Properly closed all tags and ensured well-formed XML structure. 11. Added hierarchy to separate book entries clearly. 12. Removed redundant or misplaced punctuation within tags. 13. Standardized the use of <PRIZE> tag for all price entries. 14. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for introductory text. 15. Ensured all <BIBL> entries are consistently structured."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
  <DESCRIPTION>In denen Thurneysischen Buchläden allhier, seynd dato folgende zwey Bücher zu haben, so in Nancy durch Subscriptiones gedruckt worden.</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionnaire Universel- Francois & Latin, Vulgairement appelé Dictionaire de Trevoux</TITLE>
    <DESCRIPTION>avec des Remarques d Erudition & de Critique</DESCRIPTION>
    <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <NOTE>davon die 3. ersten Tom. dato schon zu beziehen sind; das gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht</NOTE>
    <PRIZE>fl. 24</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Oeconomique, continant les moyens d'Augmenter son bien & de conserver sa santé</TITLE>
    <AUTHOR>Mister Noel Chomel</AUTHOR>
    <DESCRIPTION>Augmenté d'un Nouveau Supplement de deux Volumes, par</DESCRIPTION>
    <AUTHOR>F. Marset, Doct. en Medecines</AUTHOR>
    <FORMAT>2vec fig.</FORMAT>
    <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <NOTE>davon der erste Tomus dato bey ihnen zu beziehen ist; die gantze Werck kostet samt der Fracht</NOTE>
    <PRIZE>fl. 18</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <NOTE>So dann sind bey ihnen auch genugsam annoch zu haben:</NOTE>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Historique & Critique de Mr. Bayle</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <PLACE>Amsterd.</PLACE>
    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>L. 27</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Corpus Juris Civilis Romani, cum Notis Gotofredi</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>fl. 10. 48. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
  <BIBL>
    <TITLE>Dictionaire Royal, Francois-Allemand-Latin, par le R. P. Fr. Pomey</TITLE>
    <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
    <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT>
    <YEAR>1741</YEAR>
    <PRIZE>fl. 5. 24. xr.</PRIZE>
  </BIBL>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: 1. Added XML declaration for proper XML formatting. 2. Fixed Unicode escape sequences to proper characters (e.g., \u221a\u00a7 to ä). 3. Structured the text into proper XML elements with nested tags for better hierarchy. 4. Corrected misspelled tags (e.g., <PRICE> to <PRIZE>). 5. Added missing tags for text segments that were not enclosed (e.g., <DESCRIPTION>, <NOTE>). 6. Fixed inconsistent tag usage (e.g., <AUTHOR> tags were not properly nested). 7. Escaped special characters like '&' to '&'. 8. Corrected 'Gotofrest' to 'Gotofredi' in the title. 9. Fixed '4\u221a\u2264' to '4to.' for consistency. 10. Properly closed all tags and ensured well-formed XML structure. 11. Added hierarchy to separate book entries clearly. 12. Removed redundant or misplaced punctuation within tags. 13. Standardized the use of <PRIZE> tag for all price entries. 14. Added <DESCRIPTION> tag for introductory text. 15. Ensured all <BIBL> entries are consistently structured.
